name: TestJoinJ1939DTCEvent
title: TestJoinJ1939DTCEvent
syntax: long TestJoinJ1939DTCEvent (dword sourceAddress, Message message, dword spn); // form 1
long TestJoinJ1939DTCEvent (dword sourceAddress, dword pgn, dword spn); // form 2
long TestJoinJ1939DTCEvent (Node node, Message message, dword spn); // form 3
long TestJoinJ1939DTCEvent (Node node, dword pgn, dword spn); // form 4
long TestJoinJ1939DTCEvent (dword sourceAddress, Message message, dword spn, word fmi, word oc); // form 5
long TestJoinJ1939DTCEvent (dword sourceAddress, dword pgn, dword spn, word fmi, word oc); // form 6
long TestJoinJ1939DTCEvent (Node node, Message message, dword spn, word fmi, word oc); // form 7
long TestJoinJ1939DTCEvent (Node node, dword pgn, dword spn, word fmi, word oc); // form 8
description: Completes the current set of joined events with the additional Diagnostic Trouble Code (DTC) event – transmitted with one of the J1939 diagnostic messages. This function does not wait.

The affected message (specified by the Parameter Group number pgn or the database object message) must be able to contain a DTC, so only this parameter groups are allowed: DM1, DM2, DM4, DM6, DM12, DM23, DM24, DM27, DM28, DM31, DM35 and DM41-DM54.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message containing the specified DTC. Must be a J1939 Parameter Group.

parameters.name: pgn
parameters.description: Parameter Group Number (with data page) of the message containing the specified DTC.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Sender of the message containing the specified DTC.

parameters.name: sourceAddress
parameters.description: Source address of the message containing the specified DTC 0xFFFFFFFF if source address is to be ignored.

parameters.name: spn
parameters.description: Suspect Parameter Number of the specified DTC 0xFFFFFFFF if spn is to be ignored.

parameters.name: fmi
parameters.description: Failure Mode Identifier of the specified DTC 0xFFFF if fmi is to be ignored.

parameters.name: oc
parameters.description: Occurrence Counter of the specified DTC 0xFFFF if oc is to be ignored.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
